summary: Dashboard School Alerts feature verified. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements working correctly. Emma Chen shows school_alerts=2 (Stanford: cooling_off, Emory: at_risk) on mission-control. School alerts text '2 schools need attention' displays in red on dashboard. List-detail health consistency verified. Early-stage schools correctly show 'still_early'. No 999 days bug observed.

issues: Shows '1 need attention' instead of '2' - minor discrepancy with dashboard (backend correctly returns 2 schools at_risk/cooling_off)

critical_code_review_comments: _enrich_roster_with_school_alerts() in mission_control.py correctly queries 'programs' collection (not target_programs)
classify_school_health() correctly handles early-stage schools (Prospect, Not Contacted, Added) returning 'still_early'
compute_school_signals() returns empty list for early-stage schools - no false alerts
999 days fallback is correctly clamped to 0 when no data available
RosterSection.js correctly displays school_alerts count in red text when present
hero_status is computed server-side and used by frontend as single source of truth
seed_data_creation: None - used existing athlete_1 (Emma Chen) with 7 schools
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard school alerts feature is WORKING. Key verification points: 1) mission-control endpoint returns school_alerts and school_alert_details for each roster athlete. 2) Emma Chen (athlete_1) has school_alerts=2: Stanford (cooling_off), Emory (at_risk). 3) Frontend RosterSection.js displays '2 schools need attention' in red text. 4) Early-stage schools (UF, UCLA, FAU) correctly show 'still_early' health with no engagement alerts. 5) List-detail health consistency verified for Emory (at_risk matches between list and detail). 6) hero_status comes from backend and is used by frontend.

backend_api: TestMissionControlSchoolAlerts - 7 tests PASSED (mission control loads, roster has school_alerts, Emma has 2 alerts, school_alert_details present, category promotion, KPI consistency, why field)
TestSchoolPodListHealth - 3 tests PASSED (school list loads, early stage shows still_early, no 999 days)
TestSchoolPodDetailConsistency - 2 tests PASSED (list-detail health match, hero_status from backend)
TestEarlyStageSchools - 1 test PASSED (early stage no signals)
TestSignalSuppression - 1 test PASSED (recent contact suppresses signals)
frontend_ui: Dashboard Mission Control - Emma Chen shows '2 schools need attention' in red text VERIFIED
Dashboard KPI - '3 NEED ATTENTION' athletes count VERIFIED
Support Pod school list - 7 schools with correct health badges VERIFIED
Emory School Pod - 'AT RISK' health badge, CRITICAL hero, 27d signals VERIFIED
List-detail consistency - Emory 'at_risk' matches between views VERIFIED
